base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tile_fence_post — a tile from 1986 legend of zelda. Fence — decorative impassable tile in villages/clearings. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
